title: Leader Crown│首領皇冠
description: Leader zombie has a crown.│領頭殭屍擁有皇冠。
body:
# Introduce│介紹
- Leader zombies spawns with a crown, and has a chance of dropping it after being killed.│領頭殭屍生成時自帶皇冠，擊殺後有概率掉落。
- When the crown is worn on the head, it will add 4 points of armor, and its attributes are close to those of a diamond helmet.│皇冠戴在頭上時會+4點護甲，屬性方面接近鑽石頭盔。
  - Execute this command to get:```/function leader_crown:give_crown```│執行此指令來獲得：```/function leader_crown:give_crown```
